rankings.name: Corduroy
key_positive_factors: Daniel Muscutt is excellent on All-Weather

rankings.name: Wedonttellthetruth (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Father-son Loughnane combination is very strong at Wolverhampton
key_risks: Needs to prove stamina for the likely distance
Lacks experience in tight handicap finishes

rankings.name: Sweet Love
key_positive_factors: Callum Shepherd is a top-tier AW jockey booking
key_risks: Tends to struggle if not prominent early

rankings.name: Hengist Pod (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Andrew Mullen is a reliable pilot for Johnston runners
Likely to be well-schooled for this surface
key_risks: Poor value at the early price

rankings.name: Crown Inn To Win
key_positive_factors: Clear second-place finish last time indicates peak fitness
Ivan Furtado excels with AW handicappers
key_risks: May find one or two of the higher-rated types too classy

rankings.name: Song Of The Stars
key_positive_factors: James Ferguson is a shrewd placer of horses
First run in a handicap could see massive improvement
key_risks: Beaten 15+ lengths in all three maiden/novice starts

rankings.name: Jerseygeordie
key_positive_factors: Saffie Osborne is a significant jockey upgrade
key_risks: Lowest rated horse in the field
Recent 5th of 7 was a step forward but still well beaten
